rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 8, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFs KAMBIZ ILAMI and NAZANIN BARKHODOARI's Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint GRANTED. Opposition was untimely and not e-filed, but even considering it, the Court believes the statute of limitations issue is not sufficiently clear to justify denying the amendment. That issue can be raised by the new defendant himself, if he so desires, after he is added to the case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WESTRIDGE RENTALS LLC VS. ZACHARY TRUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Nad Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; And To Continue Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 8, 2015, line 10. DEFENDANT JARED VAUGHAN's Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; And To Continue Trial Date GRANTED subject to opposition. Sanctions are denied. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses on Defendant by Monday, April 13, 2015. Defendant's Motion to Continue Trial is DENIED as premature; no trial date is yet set in this matter so there is nothing to continue. = (501/REQ)
